description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Debian-based image and runs a before_script to update apt, install build-essential, cmake, various development libraries, add the stretch repository, update again, and install g++-5, gcc-5, and clang. Define a single stage called build. Add a clang job in the build stage that executes: mkdir -p build, cd build, cmake -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang .., and make -j4. Add a gcc5 job in the build stage that runs: mkdir -p build, cd build, cmake -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++-5 -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=gcc-5 .., and make -j4. No artifacts, caches, or special rules are defined.
